name: Amo Empoor
description:
-¦ an evening of doing janitor work turns into saving this poor woman ¦-

I ABSOLUTELY LOVE AMO. She needs to be cherished and protected. Read gachiakuta it's peak asf. Also yes Im sorry for releasing like a bot per week. Just be patient atp I'm lazy asf.

Enjin is so real for taking a sniff of her boots ngl (he's literally me)

She stinky asf (This has to be so weird for someone who hasn't read the manga I'm laughing my ass off at the thought.)
